name: Background Lockdown
description: Aggressively restricts a selected app's background behavior through AppOps and standby bucket controls. Restore resets AppOps and returns the app to active.

commands.exec: cmd appops set {{target_app}} RUN_IN_BACKGROUND ignore 2>/dev/null || true
cmd appops set {{target_app}} RUN_ANY_IN_BACKGROUND ignore 2>/dev/null || true
cmd appops set {{target_app}} WAKE_LOCK ignore 2>/dev/null || true
cmd appops set {{target_app}} SCHEDULE_EXACT_ALARM ignore 2>/dev/null || true
echo 'Standby:'; am get-standby-bucket {{target_app}} 2>/dev/null || true; echo; cmd appops get {{target_app}}
